title: Resident Technical Officer (C&S) (Viaduct, Building & Road Exp)
description:
Job Description :

  • Perform all roles and responsibilities required of site supervisors under BCA
  • Supervise timely execution of the works and maintain quality control and ensure that works are carried out in accordance with the contract specifications, drawings, allocated timeframe, all other contract documents and site instructions
  • Check all drawings and specifications to ensure that works are carried out in accordance with approved plans for discrepancies and report to OIC
  • check on quality of works, materials and samples delivered to site, take measures to rectify any non-compliance and report to OIC on any materials not conforming to specifications
  • prepare defect lists, monitor progress of rectification works and ensure all defects are satisfactorily rectified
  • Supervise works to comply with statutory requirements and specifications
  • Ensure that structural elements or critical works are being carried out in accordance with approved plans
  • Attend site, progress, variation, QAQC and coordination meetings and to keep proper minutes of these meetings
  • Help resolve main contractors' queries and coordinate the works with other contractors
  • Inspect and assist with handing/taking over of completed works by other contracts
  • Ensure that proper and updated records of all works are kept
  • Carry out coordination of all building and C&S Services
  • Working with the safety team, ensure that safety on site maintains at a maximum level
  • Any other adhoc duties

Requirements

  • Diploma in Civil/Structural discipline from a Polytechnic or Equivalent.
  • Min 5 years of relevant experience as RTO, of which at least 2 years shall be in supervision in the construction of roads, buildings, viaducts, and collating of monitoring data.
  • Shift work, including night shift.
  • Have a valid 2026 RTO Certification accredited by IES.

postedCompany.description:
R.J. CROCKER CONSULTANTS PTE. LTD.

R.J. Crocker, C.T. Consultants Pte is a firm of Consulting Civil and Structural Engineers licensed to provide Professional Engineering Services in Singapore.  The firm has incorporated into an unlimited company in 1991 and now practices as R.J. Crocker Consultants Pte Ltd.

The firm was established in 1984 known as R.J. Crocker, C.T. & Partners Pte Ltd formed by the amalgamation of  R.J. Crocker & Partners (UK) with C.T. Consultants of Singapore.

We are ISO certified for ISO 9001-2008 & ISO 14001-2004, and was awarded with prestigious Goverment infrastructure projects.
postedCompany.name: R.J. CROCKER CONSULTANTS PTE. LTD.
